title: BetterEnd Anvil Restoration
description: A mod that replicates features from Anvil Restoration from Serilum for BetterEnd anvils
body: BetterEnd Anvil Restoration is a mod that allows one to repair and destroy anvils \ (Inspired from the [Anvil Restoration](https://modrinth.com/mod/anvil-restoration) mod from Serillum) for [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) To repair, You must hold diamonds in your off-hand and any hammer from BetterEnd then right click your anvil To damage, You must hold obsidian in your off-hand and the same with how you Repair This mod works for Forge with Sinytra Connector join stupid discord if you want \ [](https://discord.gg/S9kUFsmw2f)
